sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Sonic - Shield Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Sonic has access to unique shield abilities not available to Knuckles

special_mechanics.name: Sonic - Jump Height
special_mechanics.description: Sonic can jump higher than Knuckles

special_mechanics.name: Knuckles - Wall Climb
special_mechanics.description: Knuckles can climb most walls in levels

special_mechanics.name: Chaos Emerald Special Stages
special_mechanics.description: 3D special stages where player must turn blue spheres red while avoiding red spheres. Yellow spheres bounce player long distances. White spheres with red stars reverse direction.

special_mechanics.name: Super Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Collecting all 7 Chaos Emeralds allows transformation into Super Sonic or Super Knuckles with enhanced power

tier_notes: Tier 1 designation appears to be based on empirical/qualitative data. Available sources (Wikipedia, TCRF) provide gameplay mechanics and level structure but do not document specific physics values, sub-pixel systems, or precise movement parameters. No ROM-level data extracted.
